subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been presented before this Wronged One in this Most Great Prison. The servant-in-attendance read it aloud, and We respond to thee with this lucid Tablet
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم فی هذا السجن الاعظم و قرئه العبد الحاضر و اجبناک
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement
